recommendations.title: Scream 2
recommendations.overview: Two years after the Woodsboro murders, Sidney Prescott acclimates to college life while someone donning the Ghostface costume begins a new string of killings.

recommendations.title: Scream 4
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after the original Woodsboro murders, Sidney Prescott returns home to promote her new book about surviving trauma, only for a new Ghostface killer to emerge, targeting a new group of teens.

recommendations.title: Six Degrees of Separation
recommendations.overview: The story of a young, gay, black, con artist who, posing as the son of Sidney Poitier, cunningly maneuvers his way into the lives of a white, upper-class New York family.

recommendations.title: Scream 3
recommendations.overview: As bodies begin dropping around the Hollywood set of STAB 3, the third film based on the gruesome Woodsboro killings, Sidney and other survivors are once again terrorized by another Ghostface killer.

recommendations.title: No One Will Save You
recommendations.overview: A lonely woman battles extraterrestrials who threaten her future while forcing her to face her past.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: When two American girls on a bike trip in a remote part of Argentina split up and one of them goes missing, the other must find her before her worst fears are realized.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing of Sidney Hall
recommendations.overview: Over the course of 12 years, and three stages of life, Sidney Hall falls in love, writes the book of a generation and then disappears without a trace.

recommendations.title: The Eyes of My Mother
recommendations.overview: A young, lonely woman is consumed by her deepest and darkest desires after tragedy strikes her quiet country life.

recommendations.title: How to Lose Friends & Alienate People
recommendations.overview: Sidney Young is a down-on-his-luck journalist. Thanks to a stint involving a pig and a glitzy awards ceremony, Sidney turns his fortunes around, attracting the attention of Clayton Harding, editor of New York-based glossy magazine 'Sharps', and landi
